questions.q: Which Chicago-based game studio, known for its work co-developing the PC version of 'The Last of Us Part 2 Remastered', announced mass layoffs affecting up to 90 employees?
In April 2026, President Trump officially nominated Dr. Erica Schwartz, a former Coast Guard doctor, to serve as the new director of which federal health agency?
options: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
questions.correctText: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)

questions.q: President Trump is expected to sign an executive order urging more federal research into which psychedelic compound, known for its use abroad to treat PTSD and opioid withdrawal?
On April 17, 2026, it was announced that Marielle Heller would be directing a live-action remake of which 1992 animated film for Amazon MGM?
Four-time César-winning actress Nathalie Baye, who played Leonardo DiCaprio's mother in 'Catch Me If You Can', passed away on April 17, 2026. What country was she from?
Recent backend datamining of Xbox Game Pass revealed a rumored new subscription tier that focuses exclusively on first-party games. What is its codename?
Which Major League Baseball team reportedly reached an agreement on April 17, 2026, to be sold for a record-breaking $3.9 billion?
questions.correctText: The San Diego Padres have been sold to a group led by private equity billionaire Jose E. Feliciano and his wife Kwanza Jones for an MLB-record $3.9 billion.

questions.q: A newly released report from Senate Democrats revealed that pharmaceutical companies raised prices on hundreds of medications despite pricing deals previously touted by which politician?
HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. faced a harsh grilling from Congress in mid-April 2026 over proposed cuts to the health budget and his controversial policies regarding what public health measure?
Which former Los Angeles Angels outfielder, who was the franchise's career hits leader and a key player in their 2002 World Series victory, passed away at age 53 on April 17, 2026?
questions.correctText: Garret Anderson, the longtime Angels outfielder and career hits leader for the franchise, passed away at the age of 53.
